---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for SIP
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What limitation or gap does this address?

## Proposed Solution

Explain the solution you would like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Impact

Explain how this would improve SIP or developer experience. Consider effects on:

- The Python SDK (`sip/`)
- The Go SDK (`sdk/go/`)
- The broker pipeline
- Documentation

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples here.

> If your feature request involves changes to the SIP protocol specification,
> the wire format, the security model, or protocol semantics, please use the
> **Protocol Change Proposal** template instead.
